What is Brahmamurta? All of us have heard about Brahmamurta. Brahmamurta is also called Brahma. Brahma is Lord Brahma, who is the creator. It's also called the creator's hour. It's a very, very important time of the day.
And Muhurta, each Muhurta is for 48 minutes. And Brahmamurta is the penultimate Muhurta before sunrise.
In other words, it starts 96 minutes before sunrise.
Now, mind you, Brahmamurta starts 96 minutes before sunrise.
So, what time can vary from place to place depending on what time the sun is rising in that particular place.
So, it starts 96 minutes before sunrise and it lasts for 48 minutes, which is 48 minutes before sunrise.
